summary: Platform Blueprint / Platform Vision feature — full E2E test (backend + frontend). 30 backend tests all pass. 2 critical runtime bugs fixed (InspectionPage Map/constructor clash; StationCanvasPage wrong role check). All major UI flows verified and passing after fixes.

minor.issue: Leftover TEST_ sub-zones and landmarks accumulate in DB across multiple test runs because fixtures don't clean up stale records from prior runs. Manually cleaned up 2 stale sub-zones (TEST_SZ_DIVIDER, TEST_SZ_FOR_FORCE_DELETE) during this session.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: isAdmin used `user?.role === 'SA' || user?.role === 'ASUP'` which never matched because actual user role is 'superadmin'. Canvas editor button was invisible to Super Admin. Fixed to use `isAdminFn()` from auth-context.

FIXED: `import { Map } from 'lucide-react'` shadowed the JS built-in Map constructor. `new Map()` on lines 395 and 893 crashed with 'Map is not a constructor'. Fixed by aliasing import to `Map as MapIcon` and updating 2 JSX usages.

issues: Console warning: React child list missing unique key props in CanvasEditor.js — minor, no user impact

action_items: DONE — isAdmin fix in StationCanvasPage.js already applied
DONE — Map/MapIcon alias fix in InspectionPage.js already applied
Add `key` prop to list items in CanvasEditor.js to fix React warning
Add DB cleanup step in backend test fixtures to delete stale TEST_ records before creating new ones (avoid accumulation across runs)
critical_code_review_comments: InspectionPage.js is 1382 lines — candidate for splitting into smaller components (list view, map view, inspection form)
CanvasEditor.js is 438 lines and PlatformBlueprint.js is 470 lines — reasonable size
AdminPage.js is 1960 lines — very large, should be split into sub-components per tab
seed_data_creation: WC-1 canvas_x=50.0, canvas_y=50.0 set via PATCH /api/assets/{id}/canvas during test (persists in DB). TEST-P.No 99 landmark may be present in Sub-Zone A canvas from test runs (backend tests cleaned up their own instances but previous runs left stale ones).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Blueprint feature is fully implemented and tested. 2 critical bugs were fixed (both applied to codebase). All 15 test scenarios from the review request pass. Sub-Zone A (id: 6a08bb73a861325ca76a4d60) has WC-1 asset positioned at 50,50 on canvas. TEST-GROUP-FAN is unpositioned. Leftover TEST-P.No 99 landmark may exist in Sub-Zone A — it's from previous test runs. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_platform_blueprint_iter33.py.

InspectionPage crash.root_cause: Named export `Map` from lucide-react was imported into InspectionPage.js module scope without aliasing. JavaScript/Webpack resolves `Map` to the lucide React component (a function), overriding the built-in Map constructor. Two usages of `new Map()` later in the file (lines 395, 893) then tried to call the React component as a constructor, throwing TypeError.
InspectionPage crash.fix: Aliased to `import { Map as MapIcon }` and updated 2 JSX usages from `<Map>` to `<MapIcon>`.
InspectionPage crash.reproduction: Navigate to /inspection page as any role — page crashes with 'Map is not a constructor'

StationCanvasPage admin buttons invisibl.root_cause: isAdmin was `user?.role === 'SA' || user?.role === 'ASUP'` but the auth system stores role as 'superadmin'/'divisional_admin'/'approving_supervisor'. The check never matched, so `isAdmin` was always false and the canvas editor/edit buttons were never rendered.
StationCanvasPage admin buttons invisibl.fix: Changed to `const isAdmin = isAdminFn()` using the isAdmin function from auth-context which correctly checks all admin role strings.
StationCanvasPage admin buttons invisibl.reproduction: Login as SA001 (superadmin) and go to /station-canvas — no edit canvas pencil buttons were shown on sub-zone canvases
